message:
fix(runtime): share terminal state between handle and future, fix race panic priority

TaskHandle:
- Replace per-future terminal flag with terminal_consumed on the
  TaskHandle itself, shared by reference into JoinFuture — this means
  consecutive join() calls on the same handle correctly see that the
  result was already consumed, whereas the old per-future flag would
  reset on each join() call
- try_join() now checks terminal_consumed before attempting recv,
  preventing double-consumption of the oneshot result
- New builder test: join_handle_pending_then_completion_then_repoll

RemoteHandle:
- Add PolledAfterCompletion variant to RemoteError
- join() now distinguishes Closed vs Cancelled recv errors with
  proper state transition and closed_reason() helper (mirrors the
  pattern from ActorHandle/GenServerHandle)

GenServer NamedGenServerHandle:
- stop_and_release() and abort_lease() now return Err(AlreadyResolved)
  instead of panicking when the lease was already consumed — this makes
  them safe to call defensively in cleanup paths
- stop_and_release() now only calls handle.stop() after the lease is
  successfully released, preventing a stop-without-release race
- New tests: stop_and_release_after_take_lease_returns_already_resolved,
  abort_lease_after_take_lease_returns_already_resolved

cx/scope.rs:
- select_biased race: check winner panic BEFORE loser panic, so that
  if the winner panicked, that panic propagates even if the loser also
  panicked — the winner's panic is the causally relevant one

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
